content_en:
The Haud That People Will Come To Is Before The Extended Siraat; Whatever Conveys A Different Understanding Is Either Weak, Rejected, Or Subject To Interpretation

A questioner might ask, “Will the Haud (Basin) come before passing on the Siraat or after it?” The apparent meaning of the preceding, narrations indicates that it will come before the Siraat, because people who are described as having continued to turn back on their heels after the Prophet's death are driven away from the Haud. If those people are in fact disbelievers, then we must keep in mind that the disbeliever does not get across the Siraat (path over the Hellfire); rather he will be turned over onto his face in the Hellfire, before he gets across the Siraat (ie., he does not cross the Siraat to safety). If they are sinners from the Muslims, then it is unlikely that they will

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 351

be kept from the Haud, especially considering that upon them are marks of the ablution (Al-Widoo). The Prophet 28 said, “I will know you, for you will be Ghurr (whiteness in the forehead; the faces of the believers will shine on the Day of Resurrection), Muhajjaloon (the places they wash in their Wudoo, ablution, will shine) from the effects of AlL-Wudoo (the ablution).””

At-Titmidhee said, “This hadith is Hasan Ghareeb, and we know it only through this chain.” The point here is that the apparent wording of this Hadecth indicates that the Haud comes after the Siraat (path over the Hellfire), and after the Meezaan as well. Yet | know of no scholar who holds that view; perhaps there is a second Haud from which no one will be driven away {ie., one that is for the believers after the Siraaf), and Allah % knows best

If the correct view is that the Haud (Basin) comes before the Siraat, then do the occurrences related to the Haud (Basin) come before the placing of the Kursee (Footstool) for judgment to be passed or after that? Both answers are possible, and I see nothing that is conclusive in the matter. Allah a knows which of the two occurs first.

352 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

The Correct Opinion Of The Scholars Is That The Haud (Basin) Comes Before The Meezaan (Scale)

There is a difference of opinion regarding whether the Haud is before the Meezaan. Abul-Hasan Al-Qaabisee said, “The correct view is that the Haud is before (the Meezaan).” Al-Qurtubee said, “The meaning (of the narrations) indicates that people will be thirsty when they come out of their graves,” and we have mentioned this earlier. Therefore the Haud (Basin) comes before the Meezaan and the Siraat, In the book ‘Ilm Kashf Al-Aakhirah, Abu Haamid AlGhazzaalee said, ‘Some authors from our predecessors have related that people will go to the Haud after the Siraat’ Whoever said that or related that is mistaken. Al-Qurtubee related the hadith in which those who turned back on their heels, moving backwards, are prevented from the Haud. He then said, “As it is authentic, this hadith is the strongest proof to show that the Hand will be at the Mawgif (where people will be standing, waiting for Judgment) and before the Siraat, because whoever crosses the Siraat will be safe.” We have hitherto given this explanation, and all praise is for Allah.

The Specifications Of The Length And Width Of The Haud Differ According To Who The Messenger of Allah % Was Addressing; He Mentioned For Each Person Places That He Knew

Book of The End; Great Trials and Tribulations 353,

will rule between His slaves. It is related in a hadith that on each of its sides is one of the four Khaleefahs. Abu Bakr 2 is on the first corner; ‘Umar # is on the second; ‘Uthmaan # is on the third; ‘Alee a is on the fourth — may Allah be pleased with them all.” We have related this from the Ghailaaniyaat, and its chain is not authentic, for some of its narrators are weak.

Allah # Will Come On The Day Of Resurrection To Rule Between His Slaves

We have already related the following in the hadith of fasting: After Adam #8} and the Prophets after him axe asked to intercede and after each one of them says, ‘I am not the one for you,’ the maiter ends at the Prophet #%, who goes to intercede with his Lord, so that He #% judges between His slaves. Then the angels descend. First the inhabitants of the sky of this world descend, and they are in number like the inhabitants of the earth — from jinn and mankind. Those angels will surround them ina circle. Then the second heaven will be cleft asunder, and the angels (from it) will descend; these angels are equal in number to the,inhabitants of the earth, and then they will surround them in a circle. The same will occur for the third, fourth, fifth, sixth, and seventh heavens: the inhabitants of each heaven will surround those who came before them. Then the Kuroobiyyoon angels will descend and so too will the chosen bearers of the Throne. They will have a chant of At-Tasbeeh, Al-Taqdees, and At-Ta’zeem (gloritying, exalting, and magnifying Allah #). They will say, ‘How perfect is the Possessor of Glory and Power; How perfect is the Possessor of the Dominion and the Kingdom; How perfect is He Who never dies; How perfect is He Who makes the creation die but never dies Himself; Perfect and Holy He is! How perfect is our Lord, the Most High — the Lord of the angels and the Rooht (Jibreel). How perfect is our Lord, the Most High, Who causes the creation to die, but never dies Himself.”

Ibn ‘Abbaas 4 said, “On the Day of Resurrection, the earth will be

354 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

stretched like the stretching of tanned leather; it will be increased in its capacity by such and such (amount), The creation will be gathered on one plane — the jinn from them and the human beings from them, When that happens, the heaven of the world will be seized from its inhabitants, being spread out over the face of the earth, And the inhabitants of this heaven alone twice outnumber all of the inhabitants of earth, both the jinn and humans from them. When the inhabitants of the earth see them, they will hurry to them ina state of alarm, saying, ‘Is our Lord among you” The inhabitants of that first heaven will be alarmed by their saying, and they will answer, ‘How perfect is our Lord! He is not among, us, and He is coming.’ Then the heavens are seized one at a time. Each time a heaven is seized, it will have more inhabitants that the inhabitants of the heaven underneath it, and more than all of the inhabitants of earth, both the jinn of them and human of them, by D‘aif (a multiple of times over). Each time they pass on the face of the earth, its inhabitants race to them, frightened, saying the same as they said before, and the response of the inhabitants will be the same too, until the seventh heaven is seized. Its inhabitants alone outnumber the inhabitants of the six heavens and the inhabitants of the earth by D'aif (a multiple of times over). And Allah 8 will come among them, and the nations will be in rows, A caller will call out: ‘You will know who are the ones of honor today; let those stand who would: Bo eee fee asge cae aw ee Maa CAS phere “Their sides forsake their beds, to invoke their Lord in fear and hope, and they spend (charity in Allah's Cause) out of what We have bestowed on them’

They will stand, and they will be sent to Paradise. Then he will call a second time, ‘You will know who are the ones of honor today; let those stand who would: See fe te Go Re Be fe Be eG oot Gp elt a Se LS ae Dp

$3085 2 os CH oy he

Book of The End: Great Trials and. Tribulations 355

“Neither trade nor sale diverts them from the Remembrance of

Allah (with heart and tongue), for from performing As-salah

(Iqaamus-salah), nor from giving the Zakaat. They fear a Day when

hearts and eyes will be overturned (from the horror of the torment of

the Day of Resurrection)“ They will then stand, and be sent to Paradise. When these are taken, a neck from the Hellfire will come out, and will overlook the creation. It will have two seeing eyes and an eloquent tongue. It will say, ‘I have indeed been entrusted with three: with every haughty, stubborn one,’ and it will pick them up from the ranks just as the bird picks up sesame seeds. It will imprison them in the Hellfire, after which it will come out a second time and say, ‘I have been entrusted with the people of pictures (those who would make pictures),’ and it will pick them up from the rows like the bird picks up sesame seeds, and then it will imprison them in the Hellfire. When these and those are taken, the scrolls are spread out, the scales are placed and erected, and the creation is attentive for the taking of the account.” Abu Bakr ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa related this in AlAhwaal. And Allah 3% said:
content_id:
Haud yang Didatangi Manusia Berada Sebelum Siraat yang Terbentang; Apapun yang Menyampaikan Pemahaman Berbeda Adalah Lemah, Ditolak, atau Memerlukan Interpretasi

Seorang penanya mungkin bertanya, "Apakah Haud (Telaga) terjadi sebelum melewati Siraat atau setelahnya?" Makna zahir dari riwayat-riwayat sebelumnya menunjukkan bahwa ia terjadi sebelum Siraat, karena orang-orang yang digambarkan terus berbalik ke belakang setelah wafat Nabi diusir dari Haud. Jika orang-orang itu memang orang-orang kafir, maka kita harus ingat bahwa orang kafir tidak dapat menyeberangi Siraat (jembatan di atas Neraka); sebaliknya ia akan dilempar ke atas wajahnya ke dalam Neraka, sebelum ia menyeberangi Siraat (yakni ia tidak menyeberangi Siraat menuju keselamatan). Jika mereka adalah orang-orang berdosa dari kalangan Muslim, maka tidak mungkin mereka akan

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar 351

dicegah dari Haud, terutama mengingat bahwa pada mereka terdapat bekas-bekas wudhu (Al-Wudoo). Nabi shallallahu 'alaihi wa sallam bersabda, "Aku akan mengenali kalian, karena kalian akan Ghurr (putih di dahi; wajah-wajah orang beriman akan bersinar pada Hari Kiamat), Muhajjaloon (bagian-bagian yang mereka basuh dalam Wudhu mereka akan bersinar) dari bekas Al-Wudoo (wudhu)."

At-Tirmidzi berkata, "Hadith ini Hasan Ghareeb, dan kami hanya mengetahuinya melalui sanad ini." Poinnya di sini adalah bahwa redaksi zahir Hadith ini menunjukkan bahwa Haud terjadi setelah Siraat (jembatan di atas Neraka), dan setelah Mizan juga. Namun aku tidak mengetahui adanya ulama yang berpendapat demikian; mungkin ada Haud kedua yang tidak akan ada seorang pun yang diusir darinya (yakni yang diperuntukkan bagi orang-orang beriman setelah Siraat), dan Allah subhanahu wa ta'ala lebih mengetahui.

Jika pandangan yang benar adalah bahwa Haud (Telaga) terjadi sebelum Siraat, maka apakah kejadian-kejadian yang berkaitan dengan Haud (Telaga) terjadi sebelum diletakkannya Kursi (Singga Sana) untuk penghakiman dilaksanakan ataukah sesudahnya? Kedua jawaban mungkin saja, dan aku tidak melihat sesuatu yang meyakinkan dalam hal ini. Allah subhanahu wa ta'ala mengetahui mana dari keduanya yang terjadi lebih dahulu.

352 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar

Pendapat yang Benar dari Para Ulama adalah bahwa Haud (Telaga) Terjadi Sebelum Mizan (Timbangan)

Ada perbedaan pendapat mengenai apakah Haud terjadi sebelum Mizan. Abul-Hasan Al-Qaabisee berkata, "Pandangan yang benar adalah bahwa Haud terjadi sebelum (Mizan)." Al-Qurthubi berkata, "Makna (riwayat-riwayat) menunjukkan bahwa manusia akan merasa haus ketika mereka keluar dari kubur mereka," dan kami telah menyebutkan ini sebelumnya. Oleh karena itu Haud (Telaga) terjadi sebelum Mizan dan Siraat. Dalam kitab 'Ilm Kashf Al-Aakhirah, Abu Haamid Al-Ghazzaalee berkata, 'Sebagian penulis dari pendahulu kita telah meriwayatkan bahwa manusia akan pergi ke Haud setelah Siraat.' Siapapun yang mengatakan itu atau meriwayatkan itu adalah keliru. Al-Qurthubi meriwayatkan hadith yang di dalamnya mereka yang berbalik ke belakang, mundur ke belakang, dicegah dari Haud. Ia kemudian berkata, "Karena hadith ini shahih, hadith ini adalah bukti terkuat untuk menunjukkan bahwa Haud akan berada di Mawqif (tempat manusia berdiri, menunggu Penghakiman) dan sebelum Siraat, karena siapapun yang menyeberangi Siraat akan selamat." Kita telah memberikan penjelasan ini sebelumnya, dan segala puji bagi Allah.

Spesifikasi Panjang dan Lebar Haud Berbeda Sesuai dengan Siapa yang Diajak Bicara oleh Rasulullah Shallallahu 'Alaihi Wa Sallam; Beliau Menyebutkan kepada Setiap Orang Tempat-Tempat yang Dikenalnya

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar 353

akan menghakimi di antara hamba-hamba-Nya. Diriwayatkan dalam sebuah hadith bahwa di setiap sisinya terdapat satu dari empat Khalifah. Abu Bakr radhiyallahu 'anhu berada di sudut pertama; 'Umar radhiyallahu 'anhu di sudut kedua; 'Utsman radhiyallahu 'anhu di sudut ketiga; 'Ali radhiyallahu 'anhu di sudut keempat — semoga Allah meridhai mereka semua." Kami telah meriwayatkan ini dari Al-Ghailaaniyaat, dan sanadnya tidak sahih, karena sebagian perawinya adalah lemah.

Allah Subhanahu Wa Ta'ala Akan Datang pada Hari Kiamat untuk Menghakimi di Antara Hamba-Hamba-Nya

Kami telah meriwayatkan hal berikut dalam hadith tentang puasa: Setelah Adam 'alaihissalam dan para Nabi setelahnya diminta untuk bersyafaat dan setelah masing-masing mereka berkata, 'Aku bukan orang yang tepat bagimu,' perkara tersebut berakhir pada Nabi shallallahu 'alaihi wa sallam, yang pergi untuk bersyafaat kepada Tuhannya, agar Dia subhanahu wa ta'ala menghakimi di antara hamba-hamba-Nya. Kemudian para malaikat turun. Pertama-tama penduduk langit dunia ini turun, dan jumlah mereka seperti penduduk bumi — dari jin dan manusia. Para malaikat itu akan mengelilingi mereka dalam sebuah lingkaran. Kemudian langit kedua akan terbelah, dan para malaikat (dari sana) akan turun; malaikat-malaikat ini jumlahnya sama dengan penduduk bumi, dan kemudian mereka akan mengelilingi mereka dalam sebuah lingkaran. Hal yang sama akan terjadi untuk langit ketiga, keempat, kelima, keenam, dan ketujuh: penduduk setiap langit akan mengelilingi mereka yang datang sebelum mereka. Kemudian para malaikat Kuroobiyyoon akan turun dan begitu pula para pembawa 'Arsy yang terpilih. Mereka akan memiliki zikir At-Tasbeeh, Al-Taqdees, dan At-Ta'zeem (memuji, mengagungkan, dan membesarkan Allah subhanahu wa ta'ala). Mereka akan berkata, 'Maha Suci Pemilik Kemuliaan dan Kekuatan; Maha Suci Pemilik Kekuasaan dan Kerajaan; Maha Suci Dia Yang tidak pernah mati; Maha Suci Dia Yang membuat makhluk mati namun tidak pernah mati sendiri; Maha Suci dan Maha Kudus Dia! Maha Suci Tuhan kami, Yang Maha Tinggi — Tuhan para malaikat dan Ruh (Jibril). Maha Suci Tuhan kami, Yang Maha Tinggi, Yang menyebabkan makhluk mati, namun tidak pernah mati sendiri.'"

Ibn 'Abbaas radhiyallahu 'anhu berkata, "Pada Hari Kiamat, bumi akan

354 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar

direntangkan seperti rentangan kulit yang disamak; kapasitasnya akan ditambah sebegitu dan sebegitu (banyak). Makhluk-makhluk akan dikumpulkan di satu bidang datar — jin dari antara mereka dan manusia dari antara mereka. Ketika itu terjadi, langit dunia akan ditarik dari penghuninya, dihamparkan di atas permukaan bumi. Dan penduduk langit ini saja dua kali lipat jumlahnya dari seluruh penduduk bumi, baik jin maupun manusia dari antara mereka. Ketika penduduk bumi melihat mereka, mereka akan bergegas menuju mereka dalam keadaan panik, berkata, 'Apakah Tuhan kami ada di antara kalian?' Penduduk langit pertama itu akan terkejut mendengar perkataan mereka, dan mereka akan menjawab, 'Maha Suci Tuhan kami! Dia tidak ada di antara kami, dan Dia akan datang.' Kemudian langit-langit ditarik satu per satu. Setiap kali sebuah langit ditarik, ia akan memiliki lebih banyak penghuni dari penghuni langit di bawahnya, dan lebih banyak dari seluruh penduduk bumi, baik jin maupun manusia dari antara mereka, dengan D'aif (kelipatan berkali-kali lipat). Setiap kali mereka melintas di permukaan bumi, penduduknya berlomba-lomba mendatangi mereka, terkejut, mengucapkan hal yang sama seperti sebelumnya, dan jawaban penduduknya pun sama, hingga langit ketujuh ditarik. Penduduknya saja melebihi penduduk enam langit dan penduduk bumi dengan D'aif (kelipatan berkali-kali lipat). Dan Allah subhanahu wa ta'ala akan datang di antara mereka, dan umat-umat akan berada dalam barisan-barisan. Seorang pemanggil akan berseru: 'Kalian akan mengetahui siapa orang-orang terhormat hari ini; berdirilah mereka yang mau: "Lambung-lambung mereka jauh dari tempat tidurnya, untuk menyeru Tuhan mereka dengan rasa takut dan harapan, dan mereka menginfakkan (di jalan Allah) dari apa yang Kami berikan kepada mereka."

Mereka akan berdiri, dan mereka akan dikirim ke Surga. Kemudian ia akan menyerukan untuk kedua kalinya, 'Kalian akan mengetahui siapa orang-orang terhormat hari ini; berdirilah mereka yang mau:

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar 355

"Tidak ada perdagangan maupun jual beli yang melalaikan mereka dari Mengingat Allah (dengan hati dan lisan), dari melaksanakan As-Shalah (Iqaamus-shalah), dan dari membayar Zakat. Mereka takut pada hari ketika hati dan penglihatan akan berbalik (karena ketakutan atas azab pada Hari Kiamat)." Mereka kemudian akan berdiri, dan dikirim ke Surga. Ketika mereka-mereka ini diambil, sebuah leher dari Neraka akan keluar, dan akan mengawasi makhluk-makhluk. Ia memiliki dua mata yang dapat melihat dan lidah yang fasih. Ia akan berkata, 'Sungguh aku telah diamanahi tiga (hal): dengan setiap orang yang sombong dan keras kepala,' dan ia akan memungut mereka dari barisan-barisan sebagaimana burung memungut biji-bijian wijen. Ia akan memenjarakan mereka dalam Neraka, setelah itu ia akan keluar untuk kedua kalinya dan berkata, 'Aku diamanahi dengan orang-orang yang membuat gambar-gambar (mereka yang membuat gambar/patung),' dan ia akan memungut mereka dari barisan-barisan seperti burung memungut biji-bijian wijen, kemudian memenjarakan mereka dalam Neraka. Ketika mereka-mereka ini dan itu diambil, gulungan-gulungan catatan amal disebarkan, timbangan-timbangan diletakkan dan ditegakkan, dan makhluk-makhluk memperhatikan untuk pengambilan hisab." Abu Bakr ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa meriwayatkan ini dalam Al-Ahwaal. Dan Allah subhanahu wa ta'ala berfirman:
content_ar: The Haud That People Will Come To Is قبل The Extended Siraat; Whatever Conveys A Different الفهم Is Either Weak, Rejected, Or Subject To Interpretation A questioner might ask, “Will the Haud (Basin) come قبل passing on the Siraat or بعد it?” The apparent meaning of the preceding, narrations indicates that it will come قبل the Siraat, لأن people who are described as having continued to turn back on their heels بعد النبي ﷺ's الموت are driven away from the Haud. إذا those people are in fact disbelievers, then علينا keep in العقل that the disbeliever does not get across the Siraat (الطريق over the النار); rather he will be turned over onto his face in the النار, قبل he gets across the Siraat (ie., he does not cross the Siraat to safety). إذا they are sinners from the المسلمون, then it is unlikely that they will الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 351 be kept from the Haud, ولا سيما considering that upon them are marks of the ablution (Al-Widoo). النبي ﷺ 28 said, “I will know you, for you will be Ghurr (whiteness in the forehead; the faces of the المؤمنون will shine on the Day of البعث), Muhajjaloon (the places they wash in their الوضوء, ablution, will shine) from the effects of AlL-الوضوء (the ablution).”” At-Titmidhee said, “This الحديث is حسن Ghareeb, and we know it only through this chain.” The point here is that the apparent wording of this Hadecth indicates that the Haud comes بعد the Siraat (الطريق over the النار), and بعد the Meezaan as well. Yet | know of no scholar who holds that view; perhaps there is a ثانياً Haud from which no one will be driven away {ie., one that is for the المؤمنون بعد the Siraaf), and الله % knows best إذا القول الراجح is that the Haud (Basin) comes قبل the Siraat, then do the occurrences related to the Haud (Basin) come قبل the placing of the Kursee (Footstool) for judgment to be passed or بعد that? Both answers are possible, and I see nothing that is conclusive in the matter. الله a knows which of the two occurs أولاً. 352 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations The Correct Opinion Of The العلماء Is That The Haud (Basin) Comes قبل The Meezaan (Scale) There is a difference of opinion فيما يخص whether the Haud is قبل the Meezaan. Abul-حسن Al-Qaabisee said, “القول الراجح is that the Haud is قبل (the Meezaan).” Al-Qurtubee said, “The meaning (of the narrations) indicates that people will be thirsty عندما they come out of their graves,” and we have mentioned this earlier. لذلك the Haud (Basin) comes قبل the Meezaan and the Siraat, In the الكتاب ‘Ilm Kashf Al-Aakhirah, Abu Haamid AlGhazzaalee said, ‘Some authors from our predecessors have related that people will go to the Haud بعد the Siraat’ Whoever said that or related that is mistaken. Al-Qurtubee related the الحديث in which those who turned back on their heels, moving backwards, are prevented from the Haud. He then said, “As صح, this الحديث is the strongest proof to show that the Hand will be at the Mawgif (where people will be standing, waiting for Judgment) and قبل the Siraat, لأن whoever crosses the Siraat will be safe.” We have hitherto given this explanation, and all praise is for الله. The Specifications Of The Length And Width Of The Haud Differ وفقاً لـ Who الرسول ﷺ of الله % Was Addressing; ذكر For Each Person Places That He Knew الكتاب of The End; Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 353, will rule between His slaves. It is related in a الحديث that on each of its sides is one of the four Khaleefahs. أبو بكر 2 is on the أولاً corner; ‘عمر # is on the ثانياً; ‘Uthmaan # is on the ثالثاً; ‘Alee a is on the رابعاً — may الله be pleased with them all.” We have related this from the Ghailaaniyaat, and its chain is not authentic, for some of its narrators are weak. الله # Will Come On The Day Of البعث To Rule Between His Slaves We have already related the following in the الحديث of الصيام: بعد آدم #8} and the الأنبياء بعد him axe asked to intercede and بعد each one of them says, ‘I am not the one for you,’ the maiter ends at النبي ﷺ #%, who goes to intercede with his Lord, لذا that He #% judges between His slaves. Then the الملائكة descend. أولاً the inhabitants of the sky of this الدنيا descend, and they are in number like the inhabitants of the earth — from الجن and mankind. Those الملائكة will surround them ina circle. Then the ثانياً heaven will be cleft asunder, and the الملائكة (from it) will descend; these الملائكة are equal in number to the,inhabitants of the earth, and then they will surround them in a circle. The same will occur for the ثالثاً, رابعاً, خامساً, سادساً, and سابعاً heavens: the inhabitants of each heaven will surround those who came قبل them. Then the Kuroobiyyoon الملائكة will descend and لذا أيضاً will the chosen bearers of the Throne. They will have a chant of At-Tasbeeh, Al-Taqdees, and At-Ta’zeem (gloritying, exalting, and magnifying الله #). They will say, ‘How perfect is the Possessor of Glory and Power; How perfect is the Possessor of the Dominion and the Kingdom; How perfect is He Who never dies; How perfect is He Who makes the creation die but never dies Himself; Perfect and Holy He is! How perfect is our Lord, the Most High — the Lord of the الملائكة and the Rooht (Jibreel). How perfect is our Lord, the Most High, Who causes the creation to die, but never dies Himself.” Ibn ‘Abbaas 4 said, “On the Day of البعث, the earth will be 354 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations stretched like the stretching of tanned leather; it will be increased in its capacity by such and such (amount), The creation will be gathered on one plane — the الجن from them and the human beings from them, عندما that happens, the heaven of the الدنيا will be seized from its inhabitants, being spread out over the face of the earth, And the inhabitants of this heaven alone twice outnumber all of the inhabitants of earth, both the الجن and humans from them. عندما the inhabitants of the earth see them, they will hurry to them ina state of alarm, saying, ‘Is our Lord among you” The inhabitants of that أولاً heaven will be alarmed by their saying, and they will answer, ‘How perfect is our Lord! He is not among, us, and He is coming.’ Then the heavens are seized one at a time. Each time a heaven is seized, it will have more inhabitants that the inhabitants of the heaven underneath it, and more than all of the inhabitants of earth, both the الجن of them and human of them, by D‘aif (a multiple of times over). Each time they pass on the face of the earth, its inhabitants race to them, frightened, saying the same as قالوا قبل, and the response of the inhabitants will be the same أيضاً, حتى the سابعاً heaven is seized. Its inhabitants alone outnumber the inhabitants of the six heavens and the inhabitants of the earth by D'aif (a multiple of times over). And الله 8 will come among them, and the nations will be in rows, A caller will call out: ‘You will know who are the ones of الشرف today; let those stand who would: Bo eee fee asge cae aw ee Maa CAS phere “Their sides forsake their beds, to invoke their Lord in الخوف and الأمل, and they spend (الصدقة in الله's Cause) out of what We have bestowed on them’ They will stand, and they will be sent to الجنة. Then he will call a ثانياً time, ‘You will know who are the ones of الشرف today; let those stand who would: See fe te Go Re Be fe Be eG oot Gp elt a Se LS ae Dp $3085 2 os CH oy he الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and. Tribulations 355 “Neither trade nor sale diverts them from the الذكر of الله (with القلب and tongue), for from performing As-الصلاة (Iqaamus-الصلاة), nor from giving the Zakaat. They الخوف a Day عندما القلوب and eyes will be overturned (from the horror of the torment of the Day of البعث)“ They will then stand, and be sent to الجنة. عندما these are taken, a neck from the النار will come out, and will overlook the creation. It will have two seeing eyes and an eloquent tongue. It will say, ‘I have indeed been entrusted with three: with every haughty, stubborn one,’ and it will pick them up from the ranks just as the bird picks up sesame seeds. It will imprison them in the النار, بعد which it will come out a ثانياً time and say, ‘I have been entrusted with the people of pictures (those who would make pictures),’ and it will pick them up from the rows like the bird picks up sesame seeds, and then it will imprison them in the النار. عندما these and those are taken, the scrolls are spread out, the scales are placed and erected, and the creation is attentive for the taking of the account.” أبو بكر ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa related this in AlAhwaal.
